items.title: Solana DEX volumes drop to 2024 lows: Will SOL hold $80 as support?
items.whyYouShouldCare: The significant drop in DEX volumes could indicate reduced trading activity on Solana, impacting SOL's price stability and liquidity.

items.title: If You Hold Solana on Magic Eden's Wallet, It's Time to Move It or Lose It
items.whyYouShouldCare: Users holding Solana on Magic Eden's wallet face potential asset loss, which may affect overall trust in the Solana ecosystem.

items.title: Galaxy expands retail platform with SOL staking, targeting 6.5% yield
items.whyYouShouldCare: Galaxy's introduction of SOL staking with a competitive yield could enhance liquidity and attract more users to the Solana network.
